title: DSIT cyber security newsletter - March 2025
body: "The monthly Department for Science, Innovation and Technology (DSIT) cyber security newsletter details the latest announcements, events and projects for people interested in the field of cyber security. This month’s edition includes:   New statistics show UK cyber security sector grows 12% Cyber Local funding available – register your interest now Funding bids open for the Defence and Security Accelerator New campaign promotes the Cyber Essentials scheme   You can sign up to receive the newsletter each month directly via email.  To ensure you receive the newsletter in your inbox please mark cybersecurity@dsit.gov.uk as one of your contacts.  If you have any questions please email cybersecurity@dsit.gov.uk.  Further editions of the newsletter can be found on the cyber security newsletter collection page.  "
